items.raw_excerpt: Transport Minister C.P. John visits Sharadambal Temple in Palakkad, engaging with Vedic students and celebrating Indian cultural heritage.
items.summary_en: Kerala's Transport Minister C.P. John visited the Sharadambal Temple in Palakkad. He spoke with Vedic students and took part in cultural events at the temple.
items.summary_ko: 케랄라 주 교통부 장관 C.P. 존이 팔라카드의 샤라담발 사원을 방문했다. 그는 베다 학생들과 대화를 나누고 사원 내 문화 행사에 참여했다.
items.title_en: Transport Minister visits temple in Palakkad
items.title_ko: 팔라카드 사원 방문한 케랄라 교통부 장관
items.title_original: Transport Minister  C.P. John visits Sharadambal Temple in Palakkad

items.raw_excerpt: Plans to build a new village at the lowest point in the Netherlands have moved a step closer to realisation after the water board said it was withdrawing its objection. Cortelande, in the municipality of Zuidplas, near Gouda, will have 8,000 homes lying 6.78 metres (22ft) below NAP – the standard Dutch zero line, equivalent to the average level of the North Sea – if the plans go ahead. Councillors say the project is sustainable despite rising sea levels, heavier...
items.summary_en: A new village called Cortelande is planned near Gouda in the Netherlands. It will have 8,000 homes built 6.78 meters below sea level. The water board has dropped its objection, so the plan can move ahead.
items.summary_ko: 네덜란드 거다 인근에 새 마을 코르텔란데 계획이 물관리위원회의 반려 철회로 진전을 보았다. 이 마을은 해수면보다 6.78m 낮은 곳에 8천 가구를 짓는 프로젝트로, 의원들은 해수면 상승에도 지속가능하다고 밝혔다.
items.title_en: Plan for 8,000 homes built 7 meters below sea level moves forward
items.title_ko: 해수면보다 7m 아래 8천 가구 마을 건설 계획 탄력
items.title_original: Plan to build 8,000 houses 7m below sea level set to go ahead

items.raw_excerpt: Pagamento será feito somente a pescadores artesanais com benefício deferido, em parcela única.
items.summary_en: Artisanal fishermen in Brazil will start receiving retroactive seguro-defeso payments. The benefit will be paid in a single installment to those with approved claims.
items.summary_ko: 브라질 영세 어민들이 소급 어업 보험금(seguro-defeso)을 받기 시작한다. 승인된 어민들에 한해 일시불로 지급될 예정이다.
items.title_en: Brazilian artisanal fishermen to receive retroactive fishing insurance
items.title_ko: 브라질 영세 어민들, 소급 어업 보험금 지급 시작
items.title_original: Pescadores artesanais começam a receber seguro-defeso retroativo
